== Notes for [[Item:Q105004|Q105004]] ==

Rabbi and King's (Ferdinand) Secretary and a member of the Royal Council

The Abulafia family lived in the Spanish cities of Toldeo, Burgos, Seville and Zaragoza

Rabbi Meir ben Abraham Melamed Coronel Abulafia married his niece Reina Senior.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000026051151879

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
